title: refactor: simplify daily usage pipe, dashboard key filter, and tests
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Dashboard spring cleaning
gist.blurb: We've tidied up the usage dashboard and streamlined how API key filtering works. Tracking your pollen consumption is now faster and cleaner than ever.
gist.summary: Refactored the daily usage data pipeline to simplify API key filtering in the dashboard and add direct key filtering to the SDK.
gist.impact: Users will experience a cleaner dashboard with a streamlined single-select API key filter, and developers can now filter daily usage by key name directly via the SDK.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot organizing data. The robot holds a single glowing key (representing the new single-select key filter) while a retro terminal shows a clean, simplified bar chart.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot organizing glowing digital keys in a cozy garden shed. The robot holds up a single bright key while a retro terminal displays a clean, simplified bar chart. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
